request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - our town's emergency services had to divert resources to handle a surge in calls after the latest NATO exercise. Neighbors say they felt unsafe with all the 'drills' going on. Why are we stretching our budgets thin for foreign commitments while our own communities struggle? #AllianceCommitment #PublicSafetyFirst
